name: Wolf Pack
description: Grey shapes circle through the mist, low growls rumbling like distant thunder. A pack of gaunt wolves has caught your scent, and hunger has driven them past their fear of men. Their alpha watches from a ridge, waiting for the right moment to strike.
failureConsequence: The wolves drag you down and maul your legs before the pack leader calls them off. You limp away with deep gashes that slow your journey for days.
